name: Lin's Infamous Chocolate Chip Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Stir in the baking soda, vanilla, sour cream, salt, and baking powder.
4. Fold in the chocolate chips until evenly distributed.
5. Grease an angel food cake pan and pour the batter into it.
6. Sprinkle the remaining chocolate chips on top of the batter.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
